## TabLayoutable.open() method

Called when the tab is opened.

**Signature:**

```typescript
open(window: Window, widgets: WidgetMap): void;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

window


</td><td>

Window


</td><td>

A reference to the internal window that just opened. Be aware that any unexpected changes to this object may break FlexUI.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

widgets


</td><td>

[WidgetMap](./openrct2-flexui.widgetmap.md)


</td><td>

The set of widgets of the window, which can be used to find the widgets used within the tab. This map contains all widgets currently active for the window.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

void
